profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:13:15 UTC.

ead.archdesc:
======= RMA04284Robin Bellinder papers21-41-4284Compiled by Betsy ElswitDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections2B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:20:30 UTC.Describing Archives: A Content Standard >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Robin Bellinder papers
Bellinder, Robin.
21-41-4284
10 cubic feet. 10 cubic feet.
circa 1963-2015. In English. 10161262
Scope and content
Collection contains grant files, publications, subject files, photographs.
Preferred Citation
Robin Bellinder papers, #21-41-4284. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Biographical / Historical
Professor of Horticulture and expert in weed control in vegetable crops.
Agriculture. Crops. Herbicides -- Application -- Equipment and supplies. Spraying equipment. Weeds -- Control.
